<strong>⚠️ Dikkat:</strong> Bu alanlar s: ⚠️ Warning: These fields are only changed by the Platform Admin. "Reseller" → opens sub-tenants but cannot access them. "Holding" → sees sub-tenants consolidated read-only. "Sub-tenant" → a normal tenant attached to a reseller/holding.
Abonelik paketleri, sistem modülleri ve: Subscription packages, system modules and component synchronization
Ad, e-posta, rol veya kurum ile ara…: Search by name, e-mail, role or organization…
Aktif uygulamanın güvenli (GET, parametr: Safe (GET, parameterless) pages of the active application. Destructive endpoints and legacy excluded.
Açıkken yalnızca rolü <strong>Admin</str: When enabled, only users with the Admin role use the system normally; others see a maintenance page. The login page stays open.
Açılan alt kurum otomatik 'normal' tipte: The opened sub-organization is automatically created as 'normal' type. The first organization administrator (admin) is created and a temporary password is generated. This user can then add their own users.
Bayi — alt tenant açar, içine girmez: Reseller — opens sub-tenants, does not access them
Bayi — alt-tenant açabilir, içine girmez: Reseller — can open sub-tenants, does not access them
Bağımsız bir kurum yerine bir Bayi/Holdi: Select to open as a sub-tenant of a Reseller/Holding instead of an independent organization. The sub-tenant automatically gets the 'normal' type.
Bu araç yalnız <b>Yerel</b> ortamda çalı: This tool only works in the Local environment. Actions are disabled in this environment.
Bu araçlar şu an <b>yalnız Yerel</b> ort: These tools are currently enabled only in Local. Actions are locked in this environment.
Bu kuruma ilişkin son değişiklikler, kat: Recent changes for this organization, timeline by category.
Bu pencere kapanınca şifre tekrar göster: Once this window closes, the password is not shown again.
Düzenleme yetkisi yoktur, tüm aksiyon bu: No edit permission, all action buttons are disabled.
En son %(n)s giriş ve veri değişikliği (: The most recent %(n)s logins and data changes (overall).
Gerçek UI etkileşimi (buton/form/AJAX) t: Real UI interaction (button/form/AJAX) on tomofiltest. When done, tomofiltest is automatically reset.
Gerçek tarayıcı tomofiltest admini olara: A real browser opens every page as the tomofiltest admin; catches HTTP + JS + AJAX errors.
Henüz otomatik yedek yok. \"Şimdi Çalışt: No automatic backup yet. You can create the first one with "Run Now".
Herkes en az bir kez giriş yapmış. 🎉: Everyone has logged in at least once. 🎉
Kod yedeği büyük olabilir (~100+ MB), ha: The code backup can be large (~100+ MB), it takes a few seconds to prepare.
Kullanıcı telefonunu kaybettiyse veya ye: Reset 2FA if the user has lost their phone or cannot access their backup codes. They can re-enable it from their profile on their next login.
Kurum bazında ve genel giriş kayıtları,: Login records by organization and overall, recent data activity and users who never logged in.
Kurum bazında ve genel giriş ve veri har: Login and data activity records by organization and overall. Read-only.
Logo (PNG, JPG, WEBP, GIF, SVG — en fazl: Logo (PNG, JPG, WEBP, GIF, SVG — max 2 MB)
Otomatik gece yedeği (tam DB + kod fark): Automatic nightly backup (full DB + code diff) and manually downloadable DB/code backups. Includes restore.
Automatic nightly backup (full DB + code diff) and manually downloadable backups. DB: PostgreSQL (pg_dump).
Otonom çekim bittikten sonra derlenen en: After the autonomous capture finishes, download the latest compiled pixel-quality PDF.
Paket → Modül → Bileşen → Kart → Veri ka: Package → Module → Component → Card → Data source. Cards are discovered from template markers (data-card-*).
Playwright ile gizli pencerede (incognit: Using Playwright, it autonomously enacts the YeniTomofil steps from scratch in an incognito window, captures short tutorial videos and visually annotated screenshots, and compiles the guide PDF.
Saatler tarayıcınızın saat dilimine göre: Times are shown according to your browser's time zone.
Times according to your browser's time zone.
Sistemde kayıtlı kurumların kullanıcı, s: User, strategy, process, performance indicator and project counts of organizations registered in the system. Read-only; active records are counted.
Sistemdeki kurum, kullanıcı, strateji, s: Tabulates the counts of organizations, users, strategies, processes, performance indicators and projects in the system by organization.
Sol menüde oturum açan kullanıcının kuru: Shown in the left menu for the logged-in user's organization.
Tam DB + kod (haftada bir tam, diğer gün: Full DB + code (full once a week, diff on other days). The last %(n)s backups are kept.
Tomofil'in birebir klonu. Testler yalnız: An exact clone of Tomofil. Tests run only here; real data is not affected.
Uygulamanın sayfalarını ve özelliklerini: Automatically navigates the application's pages and features and reports those that don't work. Runs on the isolated test organization (tomofiltest).
Uygulamayı izole bir test kurumu (<b>tom: Automatically navigates the application on an isolated test organization (tomofiltest) and reports non-working pages/features.
Yalnız Aktif CRUD senaryo koşuları. Bir: Only Active CRUD scenario runs. Clicking a record opens it above.
Only Automatic Browser Test runs. Clicking a record opens it above.
Yalnız genel yönetici (Admin) erişimine: Maintenance and audit tools open only to general administrator (Admin) access.
Yeni araçlar buraya eklenecek: New tools will be added here
YeniTomofil'i sıfırlar, 1920x1080 çözünü: Resets YeniTomofil, records video at 1920x1080 resolution and compiles the PDF.
Yüklenen <b>.dump</b> dosyası mevcut ver: The uploaded .dump file overwrites the current database (irreversible). A password + confirmation text is required.
[Sistem] Otonom çalışma bekleniyor. Lütf: [System] Waiting for autonomous run. Please press the "Start Autonomous Capture" button.
\"Alt Kurum Yönetimi\" sayfasından açabi: You can open it from the "Sub-Organization Management" page.
alt kurumunun verilerini görüntülüyorsun: you are viewing the data of the sub-organization.
kullanıcı — hesabı aktif ama hiç oturum: user — account is active but has never logged in.
ve tüm alt kurumlarının özet performansı: and the summary performance of all its sub-organizations — read-only.
Çekim <b>bittiğinde tam</b>, <b>durdurul: When the capture finishes it is complete, when stopped the (draft) guide PDF up to that point is downloaded from this button.
İlk alt kurumu açmak için \"Yeni Alt Kur: Click the "Open New Sub-Organization" button to open the first sub-organization.
Şimdi anlık yedek üretip bu makineye ind: Create an instant backup now and download it to this machine.
